creator: guru@unixarea.de
text: I have adde <gabor@FreeBSD.org>, the maintainer of textproc/docbook-utils, to the Cc: list (and I even suggest assign the issue to him/her) because while making this port textproc/docbook-utils, it spills out the same errors when the port wants to make the SGML written documentation; the current assigned port textproc/dsssl-docbook-modular only delivers files from world to our system;
